hooks.command: if [ -n "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CMUX_SOCKET_PATH is set. You are running inside cmux. Do NOT use the Agent tool. Instead, invoke the using-cmux skill and use cmux new-split + cmux send to spawn agents in isolated cmux panes."}}'; else exit 0; fi

if [ -n "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" ]; then cmux claude-hook session-start; SREF=$(cmux identify --json 2>/dev/null | awk '/"caller"/{f=1} f && /"surface_ref"/{gsub(/[" ,]/,""); split($0,a,":"); print "surface:" a[3]; exit}'); [ -n "$SREF" ] && cmux set-status "$SREF" "active" --icon "bolt.fill" --color "#4C8DFF"; else exit 0; fi

if [ -n "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" ]; then cmux claude-hook stop; SREF=$(cmux identify --json 2>/dev/null | awk '/"caller"/{f=1} f && /"surface_ref"/{gsub(/[" ,]/,""); split($0,a,":"); print "surface:" a[3]; exit}'); [ -n "$SREF" ] && cmux set-status "$SREF" "done" --icon "checkmark.circle.fill" --color "#27ae60"; else exit 0; fi
if [ -n "$CMUX_SOCKET_PATH" ]; then cmux claude-hook notification; else exit 0; fi
